[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 0000000 a
1 0000000 a
2 0111011 5
3 0001001 2
4 1001111 5
5 0101110 4
6 0111111 6
7 0101000 2

01 10 0001001 2 match 3
12 21 0001001 2 match 3
23 32 0001110 3
34 43 0101110 4 match 5
45 54 0101000 2 match 7
56 65 0100000 1
67 76 0110000 2
70 07 0110000 2

02 20 0001011 3
13 31 0001000 1
24 42 0001111 4
35 53 0101000 2 match 7
46 64 0110111 5
57 75 0100000 1
60 06 0110011 4
71 17 0000000 a match 0 1

14 41 0001001 2 match 3
25 52 0001000 1

47 74 0110000 2
50 05 0101000 2 match 7
61 16 0000001 1
72 27 0000000 a match 0 1

15 51 0001000 1

37 73 0100000 1
